product: Govern LLMs in Unity Catalog with model services (Beta) ​
tagline: June 29, 2026 You can now govern Databricks hosted LLMs in Unity Catalog using model services , currently in Beta.
what_it_does: June 29, 2026 You can now govern Databricks hosted LLMs in Unity Catalog using model services , currently in Beta. A model service is a Unity Catalog securable that represents a governed LLM endpoint, so you can define an endpoint once and share it across workspaces using Unity Catalog privileges, instead of duplicating endpoints per workspace.
why_it_matters: June 29, 2026 You can now govern Databricks hosted LLMs in Unity Catalog using model services , currently in Beta.
